ariaSpec.usage: Announces the dialog role when the popover contains focusable elements. Use role=tooltip when it does not.
The element needs an id to be associated with the aria-describedby attribute of the trigger element.
Links the popover container with the popover header element when there is focusable content.
Links the popover container with the popover body element when there is focusable content.
Links the popover header with the popover container via aria-labelledby.
Links the popover body with the popover container via aria-describedby.
